name: Agent Home

features.title: Dual-Brain Memory
features.description: Switchable Obsidian / Cognee / unified brain with a fail-open Cognee recall lane, the /v1/memory/cognee/graph endpoint, a default-off local Cognee service (Nemotron + fastembed), and a dashboard dual-brain Memory view.
features.summary: Delivered. Switchable Obsidian / Cognee / unified brain with a fail-open Cognee recall lane, the /v1/memory/cognee/graph endpoint, a default-off local Cognee service (Nemotron + fastembed), and a dashboard dual-brain Memory view.

features.title: Flow Cinematography Director
features.description: Multi-agent swarm that turns a one-line brief into Flow-ready video prompts across 7 modes, with reference-image analysis, a creativity engine, auto mode, and a dedicated run screen.
features.summary: Delivered. Multi-agent swarm that turns a one-line brief into Flow-ready video prompts across 7 modes, with reference-image analysis, a creativity engine, auto mode, and a dedicated run screen.

features.title: Brand Maker (Forge)
features.description: Mockup-first brand identity tool — anti-cliché logo + app-icon suite + campaign video, delivered as model-tuned Google Flow prompt packets; can base a brand on an existing workspace.
features.summary: Delivered. Mockup-first brand identity tool — anti-cliché logo + app-icon suite + campaign video, delivered as model-tuned Google Flow prompt packets; can base a brand on an existing workspace.

features.title: Brainstorm
features.description: Multi-agent ideation swarm with a glass-box execution view and QnA gates that converges a spark into a PRD, with a chat to revise the PRD after it's generated.
features.summary: Delivered. Multi-agent ideation swarm with a glass-box execution view and QnA gates that converges a spark into a PRD, with a chat to revise the PRD after it's generated.

features.title: Workspace (SDLC Pipeline)
features.description: Design → sprint → implement pipeline driven by the 9-agent Eona OS team with approval gates, story-by-story review, lossless live-run reconnect, and a git panel.
features.summary: Delivered. Design → sprint → implement pipeline driven by the 9-agent Eona OS team with approval gates, story-by-story review, lossless live-run reconnect, and a git panel.

features.title: Tools / Labs Platform
features.description: Manifest-driven tool gallery + Workbench with a shared glass-box swarm run kit (agent lanes, QnA, staged artifact renderers) for any swarm:true tool.
features.summary: Delivered. Manifest-driven tool gallery + Workbench with a shared glass-box swarm run kit (agent lanes, QnA, staged artifact renderers) for any swarm:true tool.

features.title: Memory / Intelligence
features.description: Vault knowledge-graph brain — a 3D Memory sphere over the Obsidian vault (nodes/links/soft-links/projects) plus fused semantic search.
features.summary: Delivered. Vault knowledge-graph brain — a 3D Memory sphere over the Obsidian vault (nodes/links/soft-links/projects) plus fused semantic search.

features.title: Voice (Jarvis)
features.description: Local voice front-end with Edge TTS en-US-EmmaMultilingualNeural and low-latency first-clause audio, routing capture/task/query intents into the vault.
features.summary: Delivered. Local voice front-end with Edge TTS en-US-EmmaMultilingualNeural and low-latency first-clause audio, routing capture/task/query intents into the vault.

features.title: Git Panel
features.description: Branch, commit history, and manual push scoped to the workspace folder, with git-init for non-repo workspaces.
features.summary: Delivered. Branch, commit history, and manual push scoped to the workspace folder, with git-init for non-repo workspaces.

features.title: Dark-Glass UI + Dock
features.description: Spatial/cinematic dark liquid-glass design system, top dock navigation with custom square icons, full-width responsive screens, and the ⌘K command bridge.
features.summary: Delivered. Spatial/cinematic dark liquid-glass design system, top dock navigation with custom square icons, full-width responsive screens, and the ⌘K command bridge.

features.title: Live Dashboard ↔ Engine
features.description: Vite React 19 SPA replacing the Next.js UI, wired to the live engine APIs (runs, transcripts, persona/model hooks, healthchecks, fail-fast auth).
features.summary: Delivered. Vite React 19 SPA replacing the Next.

features.title: Eona OS
features.description: Agent Home → Eona OS rebrand across the dashboard and engine, with the ponytail code standard bound into every agent.
features.summary: Delivered. Agent Home → Eona OS rebrand across the dashboard and engine, with the ponytail code standard bound into every agent.

summary: Eona OS — 12 delivered features. Team provisioned (9 agents); Ruflo swarm + build/run/test scripts ready. Latest: Dual-Brain Memory (Cognee + Obsidian) live and default-off.
